accountActions.addPlaceAriaLabel: Add a place to the map
accountActions.guestInfoLine1: Event organizer, venue manager, or event host?
accountActions.guestInfoLine2: Publish your local events and join {{appName}} today.
accountActions.guestInfoLine3: Click « Publish an event » to create your profile.

placeForm.displayOnMapLabel: Would you like to display your place on the map?
placeForm.mapInstructions: Click on the map to position your place

defaultScheduleDay.incompleteSlotsError: Please complete existing time slots before adding a new one

accountSettingsContainer.subtitle: Manage your account settings
accountSettingsContainer.title: Account settings
accountSettingsContainer.emailNotificationsDescription: You will receive an email when an important notification is created for your account.
accountSettingsContainer.deletePlaceTooltip: Deleting your place is permanent: events, place photos, reviews of the place and its events, and comments associated with those reviews will be deleted.
accountSettingsContainer.deletePlaceDescription: Remove your place from the map and delete all related data (events, reviews, comments).
accountSettingsContainer.deletePlaceAriaLabel: Delete my place and all associated data
accountSettingsContainer.deleteAccountTooltip: Deleting your account will permanently delete: your places, events, partnerships, reviews and comments, and your user profile. This action is irreversible and cannot be undone.
accountSettingsContainer.deleteAccountDescription: Permanent deletion of your account and all your data. This action is irreversible.
accountSettingsContainer.deleteAccountAriaLabel: Permanently delete my account and all my data
accountSettingsContainer.deletePlaceModalBody: This action is irreversible. Your place, its images, all its events, reviews (place and events), and associated comments will be deleted.

partnershipsSentTab.label: Invite a collaborator
partnershipsSentTab.info: Search for a user to send them a collaboration invitation.

partnershipsReceivedTab.label: Received invitations
partnershipsReceivedTab.info: Accept or decline collaboration requests sent to you.

partnershipsAcceptedTab.label: My collaborators
partnershipsAcceptedTab.info: List of people you collaborate with.
partnershipsAcceptedTab.emptyDescription: You don't have any collaborators yet.

partnershipsForm.title: Participants
partnershipsForm.tooltip: Invite collaborators to take part in your event. They can then be assigned to time slots.
partnershipsForm.addPartnerInfo: Search for a user to invite them to collaborate on this event.
partnershipsForm.alreadyAddedError: This user has already been added

reviewsReceivedTab.title: Reviews received
reviewsReceivedTab.description: Reviews left by users on your place.
reviewsReceivedTab.emptyMessage: Your place hasn't received any reviews yet, or you don't have a place associated with your account.

reviewsWrittenTab.title: Reviews written
reviewsWrittenTab.description: Reviews you have written about places or events.
reviewsWrittenTab.emptyMessage: You haven't written any reviews yet.

useDeleteAccount.confirmFirst: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible and will delete all your data.
useDeleteAccount.confirmSecond: This action is permanent. All your data (places, events, partnerships) will be deleted. Do you confirm deletion?
